title: xanthophyllum ionanthum
intro: Xanthophyllum ionanthum, also known as the Ionantha Xanthophyllum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Polygalaceae. This plant is native to tropical regions and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine. Xanthophyllum ionanthum has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it is also used in herbal preparations such as tinctures and essential oils.
